Norwegian School of Economics · Bergen

FremHenne

A student organization at NHH empowering the next generation of female leaders through mentorship, workshops and a close partnership with the Norwegian business community.

Become a member Our mentorship program

Half of the lecture hall.
Only a fraction of top leadership.

Business school classrooms in Norway are close to gender-balanced, yet women remain heavily underrepresented in executive positions. FremHenne was founded to help close that gap: one workshop, one mentorship and one connection at a time.

About us

Who we are

FremHenne is a student organization at the Norwegian School of Economics (NHH) in Bergen, bringing together ambitious female students from every cohort, from first-year bachelor students to PhD candidates.

We work closely with the business community to create meaningful meeting places between students and companies, and to inspire young women to take their place in the working life of tomorrow.

“FremHenne is an organization dedicated to supporting women as they enter and navigate the business world. With a strong focus on leadership and career development, we work to empower and inspire young women to pursue personal growth, build confidence, and achieve their professional goals.” — From our bylaws, § 2

What we do

Where ambition meets opportunity

Throughout the semester we organize workshops, courses, talks and seminars in collaboration with partners from across the business community. Our activities give members practical skills, industry insight and a network that lasts well beyond graduation.

Workshops & company visits

Interactive sessions hosted with our partners, ranging from application and interview training to leadership cases, held on campus and in companies' own offices.

Events & conferences

We attend industry events and conferences together, meeting decision-makers face to face and bringing curiosity into rooms where the future of business is discussed.

A community for growth

Beyond the professional program, FremHenne is a close-knit community across cohorts, built on friendship, shared ambition and support through every stage of student life.

On Instagram Meet this year's mentors → On Instagram Hear what it's like to be a mentee →

Our flagship

The mentorship program

At the heart of FremHenne is our mentorship program, a one-year journey pairing our members with some of Norway's foremost business leaders and CEOs.

The program combines personal one-on-one mentoring with shared workshops and gatherings, where all mentors and mentees come together as a group throughout the year. Mentors share career insight, honest advice and experience from the very decisions our members will soon face, building competence and confidence for the road ahead.

  • A one-year program with both one-on-one mentoring and group workshops
  • Guidance from top business leaders and CEOs in Norway
  • Mentors matched with members by profile, interests and career stage

For students

Become a member

Are you a student at NHH who wants to grow personally and professionally, alongside a driven community of women? We would love to hear from you.

Recruitment happens through NHHS. We usually hold two recruitment periods each year, following the NHHS recruitment rounds in August and January. Applications are submitted through the NHHS application portal.

Apply through NHHS

For companies

Partner with us

Will you help shape and support the next generation of female leaders? We collaborate with companies through workshops, visits and our mentorship program.
